programme.title: The Sentinel

programme.title: Presumed Dead

programme.title: Capricorn One

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When two young boys are reported missing, a known neighborhood sex offender is the primary suspect.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While investigating an elderly woman's murder, Grissom receives a miniature crime scene replica; Greg attends a hearing to ascertain his culpability in a teenager's accidental death.

programme.title: LOL

programme.title: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

programme.title: Wonder

programme.title: Captain Boycott

programme.title: Kidnapped
programme.desc: Robert Louis Stevenson's hero David Balfour joins rebel Alan Breck Stewart in 18th-century Scotland.

programme.title: That Hamilton Woman

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One's efforts to save a kidnapped woman's life are dependent in large part on the abductor's brother, who holds a dark family secret.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One confronts a man desperate to keep the promise he made to his deaf nephew by protecting the only place the boy has ever felt safe.

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The team tries to help a young man with amazing memory who is taken hostage to help get to a weapon with smart bullets which can shoot a target even behind cover.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Jules and Sam receive some personal news, but don't know whether to share it with the team.

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Bandidas

programme.title: House of Cards
programme.desc: A widow tries to find out why her daughter's strange behavior, a reaction to the death of her father, is progressively worsening.

programme.title: Life of a king

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When the guys accidentally break Holly's vibrator, they scramble to fix it before she finds out so it doesn't ruin their friendship.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly's boyfriend Paul orders the guys to not hang out with her when he's around. When Holly discovers what Paul did, she's forced to choose between poker night and date night.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell's ex-wife Margo gets amnesia after an accident and stays with Haskell to recover, only she thinks they're still married. Phil and Stuart spend the night in Holly's place and get to know her intimate sleeping behavior.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly despairs about dating again, the guys secretly create an online dating profile for her and discover what dating is like from a woman's perspective.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell's ex-wife Margo gets amnesia after an accident and stays with Haskell to recover, only she thinks they're still married. Phil and Stuart spend the night in Holly's place and get to know her intimate sleeping behavior.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Phil and Holly make a pact to ask their bosses for raises, Phil gets fired. Holly tries to help Phil get his job back. Stuart's integrity is tested when he dates a British woman with repulsive teeth.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly and Eden date two charming French men who shower them with gifts and glamorous living, they wonder if their dream dates are too good to be true. Phil and Haskell train Stuart on how to confront a bully at the bar.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil opens his own agency and enlists Eden as his temporary assistant to help sign his first client. Meanwhile, Holly hires Haskell as her temporary assistant. Stuart pursues the Yelper who smeared his practice's perfect rating.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly dates a much younger man and Eden questions his motives. Phil and Eden secretly become friends with benefits. Stuart convinces Haskell to pursue a woman he's admired from afar and ends up accidentally stealing her cat.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly attends her ex-boyfriend Paul's wedding and throws it into chaos. At the wedding Phil and Eden realize they're developing feelings for each other. Haskell sets his sights on the most desperate woman at the wedding.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Eden shares a secret about herself and Phil with Holly, who blabs to Stuart and Haskell, testing boundaries within the group.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hate Crime
programme.desc: A young Orthodox Jewish man is in Pittsburgh to celebrate Passover with family when he is gunned down simply because of the way he is dressed.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Saint
programme.desc: A frat boy lures a girl to his house with the promise of a party, but once there it turns out he has ulterior motives. When the girl says no, he violently attacks her. A string of violence is finally uncovered, revealing a sinister trail of violence.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: In a Toronto suburb during the summer of 1996, a man leaves home for a business trip. He doesn’t return. Fearing foul play, his desperate wife finally reports her husband’s disappearance to the police.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Angel of Death
programme.desc: An angel of mercy turns out to be an angel of death when the number of deaths in an Indiana Intensive Care Unit skyrockets. One astute nurse believes there must be more to this than just natural causes.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Hustler
programme.desc: Three people meet - the son of a wealthy Frenchman, a Vancouver businessman looking for investors. Unbeknownst to two of them, they are the latest victims of a notorious international con man.

programme.title: 72 Hours: The Game
programme.desc: 1995 - Houston, Texas. A lonely man calls a dating service and gets more than he bargained for when he is met at gunpoint and robbed by his “dates”. The women, dubbed “Thelma & Louise”, lure men with the promise of sex but then drug and rob them.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Danger in the Woods
programme.desc: Three teenagers accompany a deliveryman to a densely wooded area for a drinking party that, before long, becomes a nightmare. Things take a terrifying turn when one of teens attacks the others.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Hunted
programme.desc: A real estate broker doesn’t return home. Her family can't find her. But police do - dead in a closet in her office. The DNA on her body is tested against 150 men. No match. The case runs cold.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Mystery of Room 602 (Ve´ronique Pirotton Case)
programme.desc: On October 31, 2013, Belgian politician Bernard Ouessfal rushed down the six flights of a hotel in Ostend where he had met up with his wife, Véronique, the day before. He had found her unconscious in the bathroom with a mysterious plastic bag next to her

programme.title: Scorpion: Nuke Kids on the Block

programme.title: Scorpion: Sci Hard
programme.desc: While attending a tech convention, Team Scorpion is taken hostage by a group attempting a virtual heist.

programme.desc: Lynn’s birth father visits L.A.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Porn to Write
programme.desc: Maya sees the seedy side of publishing.

programme.title: Girlfriends: All the Creatures Were Stirring
programme.desc: Joan and William are stranded by a blizzard.

programme.title: Girlfriends: P.D.A. – D.O.A
programme.desc: William is jealous of Joan’s former fiancé.

programme.title: Girlfriends: All in a Panic
programme.desc: Past romances haunt Joan and Toni.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: A maverick politician is in danger and Michael’s job is to protect her.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Ranchers wage war with unscrupulous politicians over water rights in a desert valley, and Michael and the Knight-2000 come to the rescue.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: A small town sheriff tries to cover up a prison death by manipulating the law - and Devon Miles.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: K.I.T.T. has met his match when two vandals unlock a car identical to the Knight-2000 in every way but one - this version is programmed for destruction.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael Knight infiltrates a highly organized gang of thieves who are planning an audacious caper to rob a moving bullion truck.

programme.title: Mr. D: “Finnished” Teaching
programme.desc: Gerry’s officially introduced as Xavier’s new principal and the staff’s visible disappointment leads Gerry to try and gain their trust by making some drastic moves he thinks everyone can appreciate.

programme.title: Mr. D: Breaking Slime
programme.desc: Slime is all the rage across Xavier, leading Gerry to ban it.

programme.title: Mr. D: Mister ‘D’
programme.desc: Gerry’s approached by a producer who wants to use Xavier as a backdrop for a movie, but he gets too caught up in the details to see the big picture.

programme.title: Mr. D: Security Threat
programme.desc: When Gerry’s almost injured in a staffroom incident, he’s disappointed to realize the staff’s indifference over his near-death experience.

programme.title: Mr. D: The Dwyer Way
programme.desc: When Gerry realizes how poorly he’s been taking care of himself, he adopts Dwyer’s strict diet.

programme.title: Mr. D: A Wedding Story
programme.desc: Bobbi and Robert’s big day is fast approaching and, tired of being alone, Gerry desperately wants his own partner. His search takes him online, but doesn’t exactly translate to love.

programme.title: Mr. D: Parting Gift
programme.desc: The year’s coming to an end, and the graduating students ask Gerry what the annual Parting Gift from the principal is going to be. The tradition is news to Gerry, but he’s going to go big, or go home.

programme.title: Scorpion: White Out
programme.desc: In order to save a United States Special Forces unit from certain death, Team Scorpion must brave the subzero temperatures of Antarctica.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sun of a Gun
programme.desc: Sylvester comes face to face with his estranged father who asks Team Scorpion for help.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Volunteers
programme.desc: A group of Resistance capture a volunteer from a Taelon program for youth. Liam decides they may learn valuable information from her. They also decide to send in one of their own as a volunteer to see what the program is teaching.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Bliss
programme.desc: Lili is given a psychotropic drug called "bliss" via a Taelon device. They discover it is widespread. With an instantly strong addictive property, the addicts are dying within 48 hours. The investigation leads Liam and Sandoval to Ireland.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Highjacked
programme.desc: With a reporter on board, the Taelon mother ship is highjacked into interdimensional space. Liam is the prime suspect, causing an even bigger rift between Da'an and Zo'or. As the ship floats, lost in space, they must find the real culprit.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Defector
programme.desc: A shuttle crashes on a beach after being pursued by a second Taelon piloted shuttle. When Liam locates the survivor (a Taelon called Belleye), he claims to want to help the Resistance take back Earth from the Taelons.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Heroes and Heartbreak
programme.desc: Augur is recruited by a Taelon weapons project, but the others are worried about his involvement. When the project is launched earlier than originally planned to fight a Jiridian fleet, the Earth is in danger.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: A Jiridian probe headed for Earth is shot down by the Taelon Embassy and crashes outside of D.C. Liam recovers the probe, but he, Augur, and Julia are captured by another underground resistance movement led by the real Colonel Liam Kincaid.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Journey Begins
programme.desc: With proof that prehistoric creatures may still be living, a group led by Professor George Challenger is assembled to go on an expedition to uncover more.

programme.title: The Lost World: Stranded
programme.desc: The group saves Chief Jacoba's daughter Assai from the Ape men earning them safe passage home through his caves. But Marguerite's greed causes the cave to collapse on itself.

programme.title: The Lost World: More Than Human
programme.desc: The adventurers are captured by a reptilian race in a land where humans are at the bottom of the hierarchy. They come across other enslaved humans and rally them to help fight back.

programme.title: The Lost World: Nectar
programme.desc: To retrieve an antidote that will save professor Summerlee from deadly venom, the explorers must venture into a bee hive that no human has ever made it out of alive.

programme.title: The Lost World: Cave of Fear
programme.desc: Professor Challenger is taken hostage. To save him, the group, goes into the cave of fear to retrieve bones for a ritual offering. In the process, they revisit the dark corners of their past.

programme.title: The Lost World: Salvation
programme.desc: Summerlee saves an unconscious child from a river with CPR, which convinces the village leader they are witches. They will be burned on the stake unless they can influence the council otherwise.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E7 - Home On The Remains
programme.desc: The crew needs food. Zhaan needs to eat meat and starts spewing spores. Only Aeryn seems to have a tolerance for the spores.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E8 - Dream A Little Dream
programme.desc: While waiting for Moya to pick their Transport Pod, Zhaan tells Crichton of Moya's adventures after the Gammak base was destroyed.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E9 - Out Of Their Minds
programme.desc: An alien ship fires a weapon at Moya. The blast makes it through and causes everyone's consciousness to jump into another body.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E10 - My Three Crichtons
programme.desc: A strange globe appears on Moya, sucking in Crichton and duplicating him creating two additional people.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E11 - Look At The Princess, Part 1: A Kiss Is But A Kiss
programme.desc: On a planet about to crown its new monarch. The problem is the Princess cannot ascend unless she finds a genetically compatible mate.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E12 - Look At The Princess, Part 2: I Do, I Think
programme.desc: The Queen offers Crichton a choice; marry her daughter the crown princess, or she'll turn him over to Scorpius.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 197
programme.desc: Can you jump to safety from a collapsing rope bridge as seen in the film "Cliffhanger"? Can a strong enough hailstorm sink a boat?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 44
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can two semi-trucks collide head-on and completely crush a compact car? Can vodka cure foot odor or bad breath?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 135
programme.desc: Will opening all of the windows of a house during a hurricane lessen the structure's damage? Will a human head that has been dipped in liquid nitrogen for 5 seconds shatter when slammed into a table?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 180
programme.desc: Is it impossible for humans to walk in a straight line without a point of reference? Will binary explosives explode in the case of a fender bender?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 119
programme.desc: Will a motorcycle flip if a pole is thrust into the front wheel? Can someone break out of prison with a rope made of toilet paper, human hair or bedsheets?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A rifle in a shopping mall, a syringe of potassium chloride and a syringe of insulin, each in the hands of a mentally disturbed woman, lead to the tragic end of many lives.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: No one doubts a woman’s capacity to love, but sometimes lust can turn lethal. In the ultimate fatal attraction, "Deadly Women" looks at cases of murder driven by obsessive love.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Global Pursuit
programme.desc: In Langley, Virginia, a terrorist fired into rush hour traffic. The victims seemed randomly selected, but the motive appeared to be political, targeting employees of the Central Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970's and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Shattered Shield
programme.desc: In a city awash in narcotics the drug lords have all the power even over the police. Corruption in New Orleans grew like cancer, eating away at public safety and threatening to destroy the city. Crooked cops break the laws they were sworn to uphold.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Master Plan
programme.desc: Willow Springs, Illinois, seemed like any other quiet Midwestern community. But it was really one of the most corrupt places in the nation. This tiny village, nestled just outside of Chicago, was in the hip pocket of organized crime.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: 16-Year-Old Surrogate Stole Our Baby
programme.desc: Sarah was Dawn and Derek's surrogate, but took off while five months pregnant. Sarah claims that they took advantage of her. Who are the baby's rightful parents?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Tragic Accident
programme.desc: Rebecca left her baby with fiancé James and his mother Adeline, only to discover that her baby was hospitalized. Rebecca suspects that James is responsible. Adeline blames her for the baby’s death!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Results Revealed: Did She Cheat?
programme.desc: Justin is convinced that girlfriend Lainie has been cheating on him, and more importantly that he’s not the father of their child. But his own insecurities have led him to turn violent. Also, Steven doubts whether Ashley’s child is his.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Mommy Hurt Me
programme.desc: Stephanie’s drug addiction led her to neglect and abuse her kids. Scott’s fiancée stepped up as a mother and Stephanie failed multiple drug tests, he doesn’t want her near the kids, but wants her to atone for her wrongs!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Have Two Husbands
programme.desc: Jessica married Gian after a five month relationship. With a baby on the way, everything seems to be going great for the couple, except Jessica is married to another man, Michael!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: What Happened to My Baby?
programme.desc: Baby Garrett died of an oxycodone drug overdose while in Sharon’s care. His mother Casey left him with Sharon so she could visit her husband Kenneth in the hospital. Who’s responsible?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Burning Evidence
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Elements Of Murder
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison. When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Error
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Target
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Abduction
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear, kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The cheerleaders and members of the marching band from the University of Southern California have their lunch prepared by the remaining contestants.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The next challenge has an element of the unknown to it, as the contestants must create dishes using ingredients chosen by the roll of a die.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants must use the ingredients which can be found written on a selection of pigs' collars. First though, they must catch the pigs.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Five classic sauces: hollandaise, bechamel, demi-glace, veloute and tomato, must be the basis of the contestants dishes in this challenge.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Putting a twist on the original dishes eaten by a happy couple on their wedding day fifty years ago is the challenge for the remaining contestants.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Creating an innovative gourmet sandwich in just 30 minutes is the challenge for the contestants, with the winners being flown to a wine tasting.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Moorhouse Horrors / The Call Girl Killing
programme.desc: We investigate the story of David and Catherine Birnie, Australia's most sadistic husband and wife killing team, who tortured, raped and murdered four women in 1986.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Headless Body: The Kim Barry Murder
programme.desc: In 1981, the headless and fingerless body of 19-year-old Kim Narelle Barry was found dumped in the bush at a mountain lookout near Wollongong, south of Sydney.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Killing Fields of Truro
programme.desc: For the 2008 launch of Crime Investigation Australia, CI presents the complete and compelling story of "The Killing Fields of Truro", one of the most infamous crimes in Australia and yet another set in Adelaide.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: Kid for Ransom / Tears for Daniel
programme.desc: We examine two notorious abduction cases. The first case is the Graeme Thorne ransom kidnapping at Bondi in 1960. Thorne, aged eight, was the son of winners of the Sydney Opera House Lottery.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bounty Baby
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joining the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rain Check
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Love on the Run
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Jump Start
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Ice Man
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Run's House: The Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Run invites an emerging hip-hop band, Union Turnpike, to the house to strategize their pitch to Russell Simmons' new music label.

programme.title: Run's House: Chicks Fly the Coop
programme.desc: Run's blood boils upon finding that his backyard pool house has become filled with family junk. He vows to clean it out, which unleashes conflict with every family member who wants to hang onto some possession.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Stuck In The Middle Episode
programme.desc: Mona convinces Chase to hire Lorenzo as a pastry chef at City Sonoma. Chase becomes furious with Mona for not informing him that Lorenzo is her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big What Have We Done Episode
programme.desc: After finding out her rival will be writing her six-month performance review for the agency, Dee Dee makes an effort to tighten up her relationship with Brett outside the office.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Nervous Break Up Episode
programme.desc: While Chase is out of town on a business trip, Lorenzo shares with Mona that he still has feelings for her. Although Mona remains committed to Chase, she begins to fantasize about Lorenzo.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Mother's What?! Episode
programme.desc: Mona is taking her break-up with Chase out on everyone- only to realize that she's also putting her professional career in jeopardy. Dee Dee's newly signed client is married but when she suspects he's having an affair she is faced with a moral dilemma.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Hide And Sneak Episode
programme.desc: Mona discovers everyone is hanging out with Chase behind her back. Gus leaves town, leaving Brett in charge of the office. But when Dee Dee's colleagues tell her he is envious of her new responsibilities she tries to keep the peace in the office.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big 'Who You Gonna Call' Episode
programme.desc: In an effort to make up her mind once and for all, Mona decides she wants to date both Chase and Lorenzo. When both men agree she finds herself more confused then ever.

programme.title: NEW Half & Half: The Big Crappy Birthday Episode
programme.desc: Dee Dee attempts to get closer to Mona by planning a joint birthday party reminding Mona of bad memories from their childhood

programme.title: Girlfriends: The Declaration of Lynndependence
programme.desc: Joan and Toni decide that Lynn needs to learn to be independent. They give her a week to find a job, then she is on her own.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Friends, Colleagues, Brothers
programme.desc: Joan discovers that being the only black woman at her firm has many disadvantages and she is constantly ignored and overlooked.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Settle the Score
programme.desc: When Johnny Crawford is killed in his easy chair, police are perplexed to learn he may have been shot over a musical instrument. It soon becomes clear the young man wasn’t killed for his own sins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My Second Case
programme.desc: A woman’s mangled body is found beside a lonely stretch of highway. When the coroner suspects foul play, Kenda is called in to solve the second homicide case of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Grip
programme.desc: When a speeding truck crashes into a residential building, officers find the lifeless body of Michael Faast behind the wheel. But he didn’t die in the wreck – he was shot point-blank in the temple.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Maya, Sara, and Lilly
programme.desc: Maya, an adopted Border Collie/Spring Spaniel Mix loves to jump but is hurting her owner’s neck. Next we meet Sara, an overly-aggressive Shepherd mix and Lilly, a pushy Poodle.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bullying Bulldog
programme.desc: Bulldog Buster is prone to biting and growling. Sadie, a 3 month old Beagle/terrier mix, is frightened of trash cans. Lacey develops anxiety at 11 years of age.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Maxwell, Brooklyn, and Tipper
programme.desc: A spoiled Welsh Sealyham Terrier has dominance issues; an excitable English Mastiff has behavioral issues, and a territorial Tibetan Terrier needs help accepting other dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Anti-Social Sasha
programme.desc: Sasha, a pound pup, is perfect in the house, but outside she shows aggression towards other dogs. Angler, a Lab, is blind, and exhibits strange behavior around food.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Sophie & Daisy
programme.desc: Sophie, a Sheltie-Golden nix, tries to nip at the heels of her owner’s horse. Daisy has an annoying problem – she tries to “hump” various members of the Benda family.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Special: 100th Episode Celebration
programme.desc: Participants from more than 200 stories featured on Dog Whisperer parade down the red carpet to celebrate the 100th Episode of Dog Whisperer with Cesar Millan.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Keith Blakelock
programme.desc: In 1985, PC Keith Blakelock was murdered during a riot on a housing estate in London, triggered after a black woman died of heart failure during a house search. Nobody has been brought to justice for his murder, despite three investigations.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Bodies Of Evidence: Roger Severs
programme.desc: In November 1993, Derek and Eileen Severs disappeared without a word. When police spoke to their son, Roger, he insisted they were on holiday. However, there was no evidence of this apparent trip, and Roger was soon arrested on suspicion of murder.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Dead Man's Hollow: Nishan Bakunts
programme.desc: In 2002, an off-duty fireman discovered a body in a field charred beyond all recognition. All the police knew was that the man had died a brutal death, having been stabbed repeatedly, shot in the head, and drenched in petrol before being set alight.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Little Miss Nobody: Alan Charlton
programme.desc: An old carpet dug up by workmen in a Cardiff back garden in 1989 was the beginning of a case that would push the boundaries of forensic science. The carpet contained human bones - but whose?

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Far From Home: Kyu Soo Kim
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the harrowing case of a London landlord who sadistically tortured and murdered two of his tenants.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.91
programme.desc: Man claims ex-lover forced him to spend on her charge card, even for her own birthday gifts. Woman sues ex-boyfriend for electric bill cost; he argues he covered her rent after she broke the lease.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.77
programme.desc: A 16-year-old claims a schoolmate keyed her car; the accused classmate denies all charges/A 12-year-old girl, who is entrusted with a valuable Rolex chain, makes the mistake of loaning it to a classmate; he claims he lost it.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.14
programme.desc: Teenagers, romantically linked to the same man, bicker over backstabbing, an assault at a party, and car vandalism.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.2
programme.desc: Young man sues ex-lover for car repossession; demands down payment/Father sues son for loan; son claims partial forgiveness.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.73
programme.desc: Teenager denies side-swiping mailbox, sues friend for car damage. Woman's arm broken during playful punch exchange with friend.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.4
programme.desc: Pounding on and damaging a car in a fit of rage is a claim denied by a teenager accused of vandalism by his ex-girlfriend/A man sues his ex-girlfriend for payments and damages to a car he was letting her borrow.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.99
programme.desc: Lawyer with 42 years clashes with Judge as ex-friends dispute Miami plane ticket cost/Repossessed car due to red light running, unauthorized driving, and missed payments.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.157
programme.desc: Woman cuts son's unauthorized credit card, sues for car repairs charged to her. Man claims invited to Japan by girlfriend, lacking funds, asserts trip known to her.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.11
programme.desc: A daycare provider sues for slander after parents claim she was unlicensed, negligent, and had alcohol on the premises/Two boxers and a German Shepherd allegedly jump on a car and scratch the paint; ex-friends fight over damages.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.237
programme.desc: A 'doctored' contract complicates a case about a ruined wedding reception due to heat. Feuding teenagers and parents battle over liability in a wrecked car incident after a night of drinking.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.143
programme.desc: Dispute arises from dramatic 911 call of husband mauled by pit bull; family feud ensues. Woman sues daughter’s ex-friends for misusing car purchase funds.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.32
programme.desc: A fight over an engagement ring, a damaged SUV, and airline tickets further divides ex-fiancées/Former best friends fight over a computer and whether it was a Christmas gift or a loan.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Blue River Murder
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 2010 death of Stephanie Roller, a Colorado mother of three who allegedly went for a walk during a blizzard and was later found dead in a nearby river.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Mystery of Slide Mountain
programme.desc: A report that examines evidence and unanswered questions regarding a June 1, 1998 auto accident on Slide Mountain, near Reno, Nevada, that led to the death of Rinette Riella Bergna and left the driver, Rinette’s husband Peter with only minor injuries.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Temptation
programme.desc: In June 2007, Dewayne Barrentine met Tausha Fields and soon after they began living together. Tausha told him some unbelievable stories about herself – leading Barrentine to verify her stories online, which resulted in the uncovering of a homicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mr. Wonderful
programme.desc: Nicknamed "Mr. Wonderful" by one of his victims, Matt Mathews was everything to the women who lost both their hearts and bank accounts to the prolific con artist. Married at least 11 times, Mathews is believed to have scammed hundreds of people.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in Spokane
programme.desc: A report that focuses on the murders in Spokane, Washington over a period of a little more than two years (1997 - 1999) of at least a dozen women, mostly prostitutes.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Texas Confidential
programme.desc: A report on the 1997 murder of Doris Angleton, the wife of a successful Houston, Texas bookie. Doris’ husband Bob who claimed that his brother Roger was Doris’ killer, was tried for the crime in state court and acquitted. But the case did not end there.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Whip It Good
programme.desc: With a motocross bike and a rare stock whip up for grabs, Ton and Allen face one of their toughest competitors yet: their former employee Carolyn, who knows all their tricks, has money to burn and is out for revenge.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Fall Guys
programme.desc: The pressures of running a shop are taking a toll on Ton and Allen and not even the discovery of a stunt-man's fall bag can ease the tension. When things get heated, Ton abandons the partnership and leaves town.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: You Foos You Lose
programme.desc: When their truck breaks down, Ton and Allen lay it all on the line to raise money to fix her. They score a Foosball table, Tommy Gun drums and to Ton's delight, a treasure trove of Twinkies, but will it be enough?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Haff-Inated
programme.desc: Allen's off his game without his morning coffee, but some fun items help him re-energize. The guys find a wrestling ring, and when Allen uncovers vintage animatronics, they remind him of his days as a theme park boat captain.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Unsinkable Ton

programme.desc: The religious practice known as exorcism is examined as well as claims of demonic possession. Richard travels to a Catholic seminary in Yonkers, New York.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Could vampires be real? A well-known U.S. paranormal investigator and folklorist in New York City recounts the legend and evolution of the vampire throughout history and from culture to culture.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Metropolitan Museum, New York
programme.desc: From the mystery of a king’s madness to a silver chalice some think is the Holy Grail, discover the secrets inside the Metropolitan Museum.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Arctic Winter
programme.desc: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore frigid Canadian Arctic winter. The team uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head North through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Island Caving
programme.desc: Accompanied by a group of hardcore cavers from Alberta and British Columbia, George descends into spectacular caves that lead deep into the earth on Vancouver Island. The team carries inflatable kayaks to explore a dark underground river.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Crystal Cave
programme.desc: In 2000 in Chihuahua, Mexico, miners found a cave filled with giant crystals. Temperatures reach 120 degrees F and humidity nearly 100%. George leads an Explorers Club Flag Expedition into this extreme environment.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Highway to Hail
programme.desc: George and his team head into "bears' cage", looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones in Texas and Oklahoma. Their storm chasing vehicles don't look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Winds Of Autumn
programme.desc: This year he starts off by getting prepared in a wind tunnel, then he and his chase partner Mark Robinson head to Newfoundland for more wild weather action. Then, it's off to another encounter where the wild wind fans a raging inferno.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Java: Land of Fire
programme.desc: In the Pacific Ring of Fire island of Java, George explores new ash eruptions from Anak Krakatau, whose 1883 eruption shook the world. He travels to Merapi and descends into Kawah Ijen to explore the world's largest lake of sulfuric acid.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Eco-Disasters
programme.desc: Uzbekistan's Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, shrunk to 1/6 its previous size; a Crimea mountain carved into a submarine base; Chernobyl nuclear site reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hurricane
programme.desc: Linking up with legendary storm chaser Jim Leonard, George flies to Jamaica to track Hurricane Dean. George then travels to Nova Scotia to experience the even bigger turmoil of Hurricane Noel at the iconic Maritime village of Peggy's Cove.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Fin Del Mundo
programme.desc: Although he admits to not being much of a sailor, George climbs aboard a sailing vessel to explore the extreme southern tip of South America (Fin Del Mundo aka the "End of the World").

programme.title: Angry Planet: African Hellhole
programme.desc: George explores the deadly Nyiragongo volcano in the Congo jungle but the lava lake dwelling inside it's crater may be the least of his worries as he has to negotiate through armed conflict, a family of gorillas, and severe weather.

programme.title: The Apollo Experience: Apollo 17: Part 2
programme.desc: In this episode, hear first hand testimonials and dialogue from the incredible men who walked on the moon. Incredible footage and photos give a unique and beautiful experience of their data collection process and journey home.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: Universe or Multiverse?

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Quack-O-Lantern

programme.desc: The Robertsons perform a live nativity for their Church for Christmas, so the wives organize rehearsals to ensure that they pull off a great event. However, rehearsals get off to a bumpy start as the guys can't stop sharing their opinions.

programme.desc: When the duck guys have to pull an all-nighter to finish some work, Willie decides he wants to join them. But when a dying smoke detector distracts them from their work, Jase and Willie head off to disarm it.

programme.desc: Jonathan helps a terminally ill boy and his mother. Meanwhile, Mark deals with a thief abandoned by his folks.

programme.desc: Barney and the kids are excited because five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing buddies are putting on a show in the park tonight! Angela is learning to play the trumpet and knows that it takes a lot of practice. BJ arrives and the group visits the caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Three Lines, Three Corners
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Up, Down, and Around!
programme.desc: When Tony brings his kite to the park to show his friends, it accidentally blows into the branches of a tree! While waiting for a breeze to blow the kite down, Barney, Baby Bop and the kids play games about "up" and "down."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Cousin Riff is moving to town. Barney encourages everyone to put on a special show.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When he tries to join some older kids in jump-roping, Daniel fails miserably. He becomes convinced that he’s just too little to do anything right.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. Everyone is anxiously awaiting Mrs. Matuma’s Harambee Dance Troupe to arrive.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Go For Unicron!

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Return of Demolishor
programme.desc: The Autobots face a new threat: for Demolisher is revived in a new power, who is tougher than ever.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: A Tale of Two Heroes
programme.desc: The Autobots continue on their journey and intercept a Decepticon warp signal which turns out to be Rodimus's ship. Rodimus asks permission to aboard and Optimus obliges.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Battle Stations

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Alpha Q: Identity

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Laser Wave: Rampage

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Survival Instincts

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Each One Fights…

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Unicron Unleashed

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Open Fire

programme.title: Property Brothers: Dionna & Natasha
programme.desc: A full-time teacher, student, and single mom, Dionna dreams of providing the best home possible for her young son. They’ve definitely outgrown her tiny apartment.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Aven and Philip
programme.desc: Engaged and taking on a host of major challenges, Aven and Phillip are ready to put down roots after recently relocating to his hometown. And in addition they are planning their wedding and starting a new business.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Belinda & Tiago
programme.desc: Soon-to-be-weds Belinda and Tiago are determined to move out of their respective parents’ homes. And the sooner they find a suburban dream property of their own, the sooner they’ll be able to start their lives together.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Amy & Graham

programme.title: Property Brothers: Catherine & Viviane

programme.title: Property Brothers: Krista & Jennifer
programme.desc: After being apart for a decade, competitive twins Krista and Jennifer are sharing a cramped condo, and it’s slowly driving them crazy. They are desperate for more space and eager to put down roots in a new neighbourhood.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Get Shredder!
programme.desc: Shredder & Krang are still loose on Earth, but without the resources of the Technodrome, they plan to steal equipment from the abandoned Hall of Science at the World Fair.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Wrath of the Rat King
programme.desc: Burne has created a hot line for callers to use should they spot those responsible for the destruction of the Channel Six News Building. Inside the Hall of Science, Shredder is fearful that the Turtles will eventually find a way into the building.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cyber-Turtles
programme.desc: While investigating the theft of a rare telescope, the Astro-Viewer, the Turtles discover odd tracks leading away from the National Space Exploration Centre.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): State of Shock

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cry H.A.V.O.C.!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): H.A.V.O.C. in the Streets!
programme.desc: Titanus sends of couple of his H.A.V.O.C.mutants to bust into the aerospace plant and steal some much needed equipment. Only problem is that the Turtles were waiting for them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: Krakus

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtle Trek

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Unknown Ninja

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Dregg of the Earth

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Some children play a game called oranges and lemons. A bell appears in Teletubbyland and makes a lovely ringing noise. The noise is so loud it makes the Tubbies fall over laughing

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a sitting and standing game. They watch some children who are sitting and standing too. Po is riding on her scooter. She hasn’t gone very far when she finds Dipsy’s hat.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children hanging out their washing. Tinky Winky, Laa-Laa and Po are out walking together when a clothes line appears.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are very happy and have fun jumping all over Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies watch some children jumping. Tinky Winky makes up a dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A balloon appears in Teletubbyland; it floats in the air. The Teletubbies follow the balloon all over Teletubbyland, but they can't catch it.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love playing on the slide. They stop to watch Andy Brown and some children digging in the sand for crabs.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies jump out to say "Eh-oh" before watching a girl paint a picture of her dad. A voice trumpet rises and sings the nursery rhyme Looby Loo, the Tubbies join in and dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Samira and her friends show the Teletubbies their gymnastic routines. The Teletubbies do their own gymnastics.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are feeling hungry, so they sit down to eat some Tubby Toast, but the Tubby Toaster isn't working. They watch a little girl called Becky make chocolate flake cakes for her friend Mark.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It’s very windy in Teletubbyland. The wind blows Tinky Winky’s skirt, Dipsy’s hat, Laa-Laa’s ball and Po off her scooter.

programme.title: The Big Dino Dig
programme.desc: In this new episodic special Bob and the team tackle a big new job – building a dinosaur-themed fun park. With the help of park manager Tony Toberomi and new dumper truck Rubble, the team constructs a roller coaster, slide, train ride and flying ride.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Roley is desperate to help with the apple harvest, but there’s not much a road roller can do to help. Farmer Pickles, meanwhile, asks Bob to build him a new press to make apple juice. Roley tries to help Spud collect a load of apples

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building Sunflower Valley’s first geodesic dome. As Wendy has organised the dome and knows how it all fits together, Bob suggests that she might like to take charge of the job. Reluctantly Wendy agrees.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop and the machines are in Sunflower Valley setting up Wendy’s caravan. Scoop contacts Muck to find out where Bob has got to. Muck explains that they haven’t left Bobsville yet because they’ve lost Bob’s Dad!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are taking a break from building so they can tidy-up all the left over materials from around the Valley. Farmer Pickles asks Bob if he’ll put together Scruffty’s new kennel. Bob’s got a busy morning but agrees to build the kennel later on.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles has a new family of Pigs being delivered to his farm and Bob must build a new home for them. In the meantime, Farmer Pickles places the pigs in an old Barn to keep them safe.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has been making secret early morning trips to the school where Mrs Percival has been giving him salsa lessons, as he wants to impress everybody at the town dance that night.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It is Wendy’s birthday, but she insists she doesn’t want any fuss – such as a surprise party. She heads off to start the day’s work, laying a Heritage Trail around the town, and Bob reveals to the Machines that he is not planning a party.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has a day off and he takes a trip to Farmer Pickles farm to take some photographs for the town photography competition. Wendy, meanwhile, has been called to the school hall where a pipe has burst, threatening the competition.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are all ready to set up Mr Sabatini’s bakery opposite the windmill so it’s close to the flour. Bob promises a surprise when they get there, and who should roll out from behind a bush but Benny!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Today Bob and the team have a very exciting job to do. They are building a bridge over the river to where Mr Sabatini’s new bakery will be. Bob promises Scrambler that he can be the first machine across the bridge.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Fothergill has a nasty case of dry rot, so Bob and crew will have to use some smelly chemicals to fix it. As these will affect Mr Fothergill’s allergies, he goes to his sister’s for the day. But she doesn’t get on with Hamish, his pet parrot.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: After a stormy night, Wendy has to mend a chimney pot at Mrs Potts’, while Bob repairs a drainage pipe for Farmer Pickles. A wire fence has been blown away at the farm too, but fixing the pipe takes priority.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Today’s the day that the machines get to build their brand new shelter. It’s going to be built into the side of a hill and made using found materials. Lofty, who slept outside at the old yard, decides that he’d like a place in the new shelter.

programme.title: When Bob Became a Builder
programme.desc: It’s a beautiful day in Sunflower Valley and Bob and his machine team are building a new picnic area at the beach. Dizzy, Lofty and Scrambler are clearing stuff that’s been washed up on the beach, while Benny has a great time digging with Scoop and Muck.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken for a Ride

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Taken Out
programme.desc: Was Donovan Reidy deliberately run down and left to die? In 1995, 23-year-old Donovan Reidy was at a party when he got into a fight. A short while later, his bloodied body was found on the side of a major New Zealand highway.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fury
programme.desc: Kathy, her two daughters and her new husband, "Farmer" thought they had the perfect, quiet life deep in the mountains of West Virginia.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Return of the Dead: Glove II
programme.desc: PRS returns to the site of one of their most famous cases, Daisytown, PA, where they had discovered a glove print of an old miner that they determined was the spirit of a Great-Grandfather.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Southern Discomfort At Sweetwater Mansion
programme.desc: PRS heads to the Deep South to investigate a haunted Antebellum Mansion in disrepair. The caretaker and volunteers at the property have many a tale to tell of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Ladder
programme.desc: A large family in Shrewsbury, MA, has been living with a spirit for the last 40 years. To most of the siblings, the entity is menacing and evil, but Sandy seems to have a different connection.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shadow Caster
programme.desc: PRS investigates an Alabama home where clients, Georgiana and her two daughters, are so terrified, they moved out after only 18 months. They have seen shadow figures, been touched and have a recorded EVP stating, "Look at me, get out of here."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Suicide Possession
programme.desc: Joan and her boyfriend Tony are seeing apparitions in their New Jersey home. Both are concerned that the spirits are influencing their behavior: a non-drinker, Tony has turned to the bottle while Joan has thoughts of harming herself.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Yvette takes her team to the mysterious Guys Cliffe House, once a private dwelling, it is now home to the Fraternal Brotherhood of Freemasons. The team are followed by a very persistent poltergeist that will seem to stop at nothing to get their attention.

programme.title: NEW & EXCLUSIVE! MOST HAUNTED
programme.desc: Yvette and her team continue their investigation into this mysterious place. With something seemingly stalking the crew the night ends with a particularly vigorous spirit in a very small room.

programme.title: Most Haunted: ACCRINGTON COURTS PT1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding leads Most Haunted to Accrington's old police station and courts, housing playful spirits and malevolent entities. Is the evil too much for the team?

programme.title: Most Haunted: ACCRINGTON COURTS PT2
programme.desc: The second part of Yvette Fielding and the Most Haunted team's investigation at the now-abandoned old police station and courts in Accrington. With the team splitting up to cover as much space as they can, something seems to be stalking them.

programme.title: Most Haunted: ACCRINGTON COURTS PT3
programme.desc: The third and final part of this terrifying and intriguing investigation into the paranormal activity at Accrington’s Old Police Station and Courts.

programme.title: Most Haunted: TOWNELEY HALL Pt1
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding is back with the first part of a brand-new episode of Most Haunted. The intrepid ghost hunter has taken her team to the historic hall, which is said to be haunted by ancestral ghosts, the apparition of a white lady and a demon dog.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Mystery of Douglas Hibbard, Wheelchair Man, The Vigil, The Mandarin's Bowl, Ghost Writer.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Dorm, The Child Artist, The Weatherman, Sit-Down Comedian, Room 245.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: For the Record, Halloween, Precious, Get Your Kicks at Motel 66, Phantom Drifter.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Second Sight, The Fine Line, The Wrong Turn, Who Was I, You Are Next.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 11
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Bon Voyage, The Man in the Model T, The Scoop, Angel on Board, Buenos Dias.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Motorcycle, Blind Man's Dog, Deer Hunters, Tribal Curse, The Card Game.

programme.desc: Join Amy and her mom in their new home, where they quickly get the sense that they’re not alone. Then see what happens after Jill returns from her grandfather’s funeral and hears the bathroom water running.

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life
programme.desc: See what happens after Robin’s daughter leaves for the evening and Robin hears voices coming from the living room. Meanwhile, Pauline and her younger daughter notice evidence of their deceased cat Kevin when they move into a new apartment.

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life
programme.desc: See what happens when a mother and daughter spend the last night of their trip to Ireland in a castle. Meanwhile, eight-year-old Greg heads to his kitchen to investigate a mysterious sound, which sets the stage for a series of terrifying events.

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life
programme.desc: Watch a young woman spend an unsettling evening in her very first apartment. Then see strange spirits chase a young man throughout his house, from his bedroom to the basement.

programme.title: NEW: Scariest Night Of My Life

programme.title: A Haunting: Games of Lies
programme.desc: In 2012, Olivia and Jesse Barbour move into their dream home with five-year-old daughter Marie. Soon after, Marie makes her first friend in the neighborhood, a boy named Jackson. Olivia is thrilled until she realizes Jackson is really an imaginary friend.

programme.title: A Haunting: Norman the Doll
programme.desc: Paranormal investigator, Stephen Lancaster, doesn’t believe in haunted objects until he captures proof the doll he recently acquired is haunted. Fearing he is in over his head, he attempts to get rid of it, but the doll has other plans.

programme.title: A Haunting: Legend Trippers
programme.desc: High school classmates test out an old ghost story on Halloween night.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Dark Side
programme.desc: The Wilcott’s 5-year-old son is attacked by an unseen entity. Their only hope is an exorcism.

programme.title: A Haunting: Child’s Play
programme.desc: The loving spirit of Chris' late grandmother is watching over his close-knit family. But she is trying to warn them: a fierce and relentless demon has crept into their home. Chris reaches out to a paranormal team and a demonologist to battle the demon.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's TV remote control is stolen by a partridge who collects high tech objects. This is a case of absolute urgency. Grizzy has no other choice but to requisition the Lemmings' propulsion game to recover his possession.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have discovered a truly wild new game, an augmented reality programme on the ranger's digital tablet. Grizzy confiscates this toy and becomes a fan of the salmon fishing game.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The only edible food item left in the ranger's cabin is a salmon stuck inside a block of ice. Starving, Grizzy decides to melt the ice with the blow dryer. Only the Lemmings are already using it for their latest rocket game in the piping system.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have unearthed a box filled with birthday fountains of light that spit forth giant bursts of sparks. They have a blast, but their new game is not really compatible with a bear's nap.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's last jar of chocolate spread has been pinched by the Lemmings, who are savouring it in secret.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Wedged in his sofa to relieve his aching back, Grizzy baulks at getting up. He designs clever strategies to do everything from a distance, including confiscating the Lemming's radio-controlled toy robot transformer, which he will use as a butler.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The vibrations created by Grizzy's snoring during his nap give the Lemmings an idea for a bouncing game. But when Grizzy changes positions and his snoring stops, the Lemmings must find other sources of vibrations.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a birthday piñata in the ranger's living room. The idea of bursting open a papier-mache statue with a bat as it says in the instructions pleases him.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Inside a mysterious cave, Grizzy and the Lemmings discover a magical Game of the Goose. The events displayed in the squares that the players land on come true in real life.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy is bothered by an object stuck in between the sofa cushions. It's a big fur lemming puppet glove and the Lemmings believe that the puppet is a Super Lemming who's stronger than Grizzy and start to obey it.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy discovers the leftovers of a Halloween party in the ranger's cabin, which was entirely redecorated for the occasion.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: When the last jar of chocolate spread they were fighting over sinks to the bottom of the river, Grizzy and the Lemmings have no choice but to dive in to recover it. But to their great surprise, they discover you can't breathe in water.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy finds a strange figurine with the power to switch the spirits of two living beings and finds himself imprisoned in the body of a caribou.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: While salmon fishing on the riverbank, Grizzy hauls in an unusual catch: an old hand mirror straight out of a fairytale; instead of showing the reflection of the person who holds it, the mirror shows an idealized vision of his surroundings.
